name: gsc-opportunity-analyzer
description: Find striking-distance queries, CTR gaps, rising demand, decay, and page opportunities in Google Search Console CSV exports.

scripts.check: node --check src/csv.mjs && node --check src/engine.mjs && node --check src/format.mjs && node --check src/index.mjs && node --check bin/gsc-opportunity.mjs && node --check action/index.mjs

author: Demi Valerith
